items.name: action-box
items.title: Action Box
items.description: A configurable action form with token input, detail rows, and submit button for DeFi operations like staking, lending, and closing positions.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: A real-time feed of recent activity with token icons, descriptions, and relative timestamps.

items.name: address-display
items.title: Address Display
items.description: Displays a truncated Solana wallet address with a copy-to-clipboard button.

items.name: auth-card
items.title: Auth Card
items.description: An authentication card with email/password form and social login buttons for wallet-connected apps.

items.name: health-bar
items.title: Health Bar
items.description: A visual health/risk indicator bar that transitions from green to yellow to red based on a percentage value.

items.name: leverage-slider
items.title: Leverage Slider
items.description: A slider for selecting trading leverage with configurable min/max range and step increments.

items.name: nft-card
items.title: NFT Card
items.description: A card for displaying NFT artwork with collection name, token name, and loading skeleton.

items.name: order-book
items.title: Order Book
items.description: A real-time order book display with bid/ask levels, depth visualization, mid-price, and spread indicator.

items.name: order-form
items.title: Order Form
items.description: A take profit and stop loss order form for open trading positions with auto-syncing price/percent fields.

items.name: pool-card
items.title: Pool Card
items.description: A card for displaying liquidity pool information with token icons, metrics grid, and optional sparkline chart.

items.name: pool-table
items.title: Pool Table
items.description: A sortable table of liquidity pools with token icon groups, TVL, volume, APY, and rewards columns.

items.name: position-card
items.title: Position Card
items.description: A card displaying an open trading position with side indicator, token icon, size, leverage, entry/mark prices, and P&L.

items.name: position-table
items.title: Position Table
items.description: A sortable table of open trading positions with built-in TP/SL editor and close position dialogs.

items.name: price-chart
items.title: Price Chart
items.description: An area chart for displaying token price history over time using Recharts.

items.name: sparkline-chart
items.title: Sparkline Chart
items.description: A compact inline sparkline chart for showing price trends in cards and table cells.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: A card for displaying a single key metric with label, value, and optional trend badge.

items.name: swap-box
items.title: Swap Box
items.description: A two-sided token swap form with flip button, balance display, detail rows, and submit action.

items.name: token-combobox
items.title: Token Combobox
items.description: A searchable dropdown combobox for selecting tokens with icon display.

items.name: token-command
items.title: Token Command
items.description: A command palette for searching and selecting tokens with keyboard navigation.

items.name: token-icon
items.title: Token Icon
items.description: Renders a circular token icon with loading skeleton fallback.

items.name: token-icon-group
items.title: Token Icon Group
items.description: Displays a group of overlapping token icons with a configurable max and overflow indicator.

items.name: token-input
items.title: Token Input
items.description: A numeric input with integrated token selector dropdown, balance display, and half/max buttons.

items.name: trade-box
items.title: Trade Box
items.description: A perpetual trading form with long/short toggle, token input, leverage slider, detail rows, and submit action.

items.name: trade-buttons
items.title: Trade Buttons
items.description: A long/short toggle button group for selecting trade direction.

items.name: trade-chart
items.title: Trade Chart
items.description: A professional candlestick chart using lightweight-charts for trading interfaces.

items.name: trend-badge
items.title: Trend Badge
items.description: A badge that displays a percentage change with an up/down arrow icon and color coding.

items.name: txn-table
items.title: Transaction Table
items.description: A table of recent transactions with action badges, token icons, amounts, values, timestamps, and explorer links.

items.name: txn-toast
items.title: Transaction Toast
items.description: A toast notification function for displaying transaction status updates with explorer links and close button.

items.name: wallet-sheet
items.title: Wallet Sheet
items.description: A slide-out sheet displaying wallet information with address, token balances, and disconnect button.

items.name: sol-lib-types
items.title: SolanaUI Types
items.description: Shared type definitions used by SolanaUI components.

items.name: sol-lib-sort-utils
items.title: SolanaUI Sort Utilities
items.description: Shared sorting utilities for sortable table components.
